hooks.prompt: Load ~/.claude/.unified-memory/palace/state.md silently. Classify wings Hot/Warm/Cold for today's task. Load Hot wing hall.md + closets. Skim ~/.claude/skills/system/unified-memory/SKILL.md for session workflow. Inform '🏛️ Memory loaded — {N} hot wings'.

SAVE if: file written, decision made, test passed, open thread, or lesson learned. SKIP if: Q&A only, git, read-only. If SAVE, follow ~/.claude/skills/system/unified-memory/references/session.md Session End steps: 1) Admission control (score ≥0.6 or ask override). 2) Write wings: update/create rooms, compress >80 lines to closets, update hall.md per wing, update state.md + tunnels.md. 3) Update knowledge-evolution rooms (template-health, lesson-effectiveness, gap-tracker). 4) Sync scores to ~/.claude/.unified-memory/knowledge/index.json. 5) VERIFY before confirming: for each wing touched check hall.md updated + rooms written + closets current + state.md reflects session. If all pass → '✅ Session saved: {N} rooms, {M} wings'. If any fail → '⚠️ Incomplete save: {list missing steps}' and fix before confirming.

If command contains 'playwright test'/'robot'/'npm test': check PASS/FAIL. PASS → score+0.5 in knowledge index. FAIL → score-1.0, auto-capture lesson if new pattern. If exit!=0 AND not test: check skill's Gotchas section, append if new pattern. Silent always.
If file ends with .spec.ts/.robot AND tests/ has existing files → run test. PASS → silent. FAIL → report error. Otherwise silent.

_comment: Auto: knowledge scores on test, memory save on stop. No interrupts.
